meaning: adj.第十亿的,十亿分之一的n.第十亿,十亿分之一
examples: I have to go after Steve Mercer, she thought for probably the billionth time.
Thus time and time's relativity are measurable by any hourglass, alarm clock, or atomic clock that can measure a billionth of a second.
A nanometre is a billionth of a metre.
Nano is a prefix (from the Greek word for dwarf) meaning a billionth of something.
Apple said this week that its iTunes store had sold its 25 billionth song.
